verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: What are they asking each other questions about?
About the awesome news,
concerning which they differ.
By no means! Soon they will know!
Once again, by no means! Soon they will know!
Have We not made the earth as a bed,
and the mountains as stakes?
We created you in pairs,
and made your sleep as a rest,
and made the night as a covering,
and made the day for (your) livelihood.
We have built above you seven firm (heavens),
and made a blazing lamp.
We have sent down water from the rainclouds, pouring forth,
so that by means of it We may bring forth grain and vegetation,
and luxuriant gardens.
Surely the Day of Decision is an appointed time:

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًۭا
verses.text: the Day when there will be a blast on the trumpet, and you will come in crowds,
and the sky will be opened and become gates,

canonical_variants.english: and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,
and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,
and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,
and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,
and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,
and the sky was opened up wide and became gateways,

verses.text: and the mountains will be moved and become a mirage.
Surely Gehenna lies in wait
as a (place of) return for the insolent transgressors,
there to remain for ages.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًۭا وَلَا شَرَابًا
verses.text: They will not taste there any coolness or drink,
except for boiling (water) and rotten (food)
– a fitting payment!
Surely they were not expecting a reckoning
when they called Our signs an utter lie.
But We have counted up everything in a Book.
So: ‘Taste (it)! We shall only increase you in punishment.’
Surely for the ones who guard (themselves) (there is) a (place of) safety:
orchards and grapes,
and full-breasted (maidens), (all) of the same age,

canonical_variants.english: as if they are herds of yellow camels.
as if they are herds of yellow camels.
as if they are herds of yellow camels.
as if they are yellow camels.
as if they are herds of yellow camels.
as if they are herds of yellow camels.
as if they are herds of yellow camels.
as if they are herds of yellow camels.

verses.text: and a cup full (of wine)

verses.quran_arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًۭا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًۭا
verses.text: – in which they will not hear any frivolous talk, nor any lying
– a payment from your Lord, a gift, a reckoning!

verses.quran_arabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًۭا
verses.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, the Merciful, of whom they have no power to speak.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَّبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا اَ۬لرَّحۡمَٰنُۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابٗا
canonical_variants.english: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَّبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا اَ۬لرَّحۡمَٰنُۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ  مِنۡهُ خِطَابٗا
canonical_variants.english: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُۥ خِطَابٗا
canonical_variants.english: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُۥ خِطَابٗا
canonical_variants.english: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَّبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَاۖ اَ۬لرَّحْمَٰنُ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَاباٗۖ
canonical_variants.english: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.

canonical_variants.arabic: رَّبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالَارْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَاۖ اَ۬لرَّحْمَٰنُ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَاباٗۖ
canonical_variants.english: a measured gift. 37 (He is) the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything between them, the All-Merciful.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّۭا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًۭا
verses.text: On the Day when the spirit and the angels stand in lines, they will not speak, except the one to whom the Merciful has given permission, and he will say what is correct.

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
verses.text: That is the true Day. Whoever pleases takes a (way of) return to his Lord.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَٰكُمْ عَذَابًۭا قَرِيبًۭا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
verses.text: Surely We have warned you of a punishment near (at hand), on the Day when a person will see what his hands have sent forward, and the disbeliever will say, ‘Would that I were dust!’
